description_long: This is a modern, open shelving unit featuring a geometric arrangement of horizontal wooden planks supported by vertical black metal rods. The shelves are staggered at different heights and lengths, creating a visually dynamic and asymmetrical design. The wood appears to be finished with a warm, medium-brown stain, highlighting the natural grain and texture. The black metal supports are slim and minimal, providing structural stability while maintaining an airy, open look. There are no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments, making the shelves fully accessible from the front. This type of shelving is ideal for displaying books, decorative objects, or plants in urban interiors, such as lofts, cafes, or modern offices.
description: A modern, open shelving unit with staggered wooden shelves and black metal supports, designed for display and storage. The geometric, asymmetrical layout gives it a contemporary and airy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of staggered wooden shelves and black metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the shelves and the vertical alignment of the metal rods.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the open structure and shelf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and vertical supports.
